$meta.purpose: FI Calc source-specific annual market fixture extracted from the public client bundle for exact replay parity tests.
notes: Rows are transformed to the annual fields consumed by the FI Calc worker: total stock return, bond total return, and CPI start/end values.
FI Calc appends a synthetic next-year row internally so a 30-year all-history run over 1871-2024 creates 125 complete simulations from 1871 through 1995.
This fixture intentionally stores the source data, not our local historical_annual_returns approximation.
